name: Butter Slow Rising Squishy，Squishy Toy,Dumpling Stress Balls，PU Materia Fidget Toy for Office or Party Favor
bullets: Non-toxic premium PU: Smooth, skin-safe & non-irritating. High resilience, retains shape after repeated squeezing. For compression only; do not stretch forcefully.

Distinctive Vanilla Profile: Features a subtle infusion of creamy vanilla notes for a unique product character. Note: The scent is designed to naturally dissipate; for a neutral experience, place the unit in a well-ventilated area for 24-48 hours.

Superior Stress Management: Squishy Engineered for a satisfying tactile experience to alleviate tension and enhance mental focus. Ideal for professional environments, providing a therapeutic outlet for daily stress and anxiety.
Compact & Portable Design: Streamlined and lightweight for discrete use. Perfectly sized for palms, pockets, or bags, ensuring accessible relaxation and focus-support during travel or office hours.

Novelty party favors & cute fun gadgets: This squeeze squishy is an ideal stress reliever for daily life and social occasions. Great for holiday present, fun present-swapping games, and lovely creative presents for family and friends.

reviews.name: Sam
reviews.title: Soft Slow-Rising and Excellent Value!/honest
reviews.body: This slow-rising butter squishy is really lovely. The texture is very soft and realistic, and it feels satisfying to squeeze. It rises slowly, a little slower than I expected, but that actually makes it more fun to play with. There is a slight chemical smell when it’s new, but it’s not strong and goes away fairly quickly. The labels are a little crooked, but not too noticeable and it doesn’t…

reviews.name: Hilde Flores
reviews.title: Very satisfying and stress relieving
reviews.body: I bought this item for my pre teen/ teen daughters who like to fidget. The item has been thrown around quite often provided the many other siblings in the home that like to use it. It is safe to say it has survived the chaos. The item does have a slight scent but it’s not as anything cumbersome. The texture is very soft and has a slow rise movement which is very satisfying. It’s a bit sticky…

reviews.name: Kass
reviews.title: Worth the money
reviews.body: It’s a very soft slow rising squishy. I’m not really sure why people are saying the smell is bad, I quite like it. It smells like a salted caramel to me. The lettering doesn’t come off quick if you just play with it gently, it’s bound to come off but that is bound to happen with every foam squishy that has lettering. Cheap and worth it.
